input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8599 [Automation] java run fails for org.clojure:google-closure-library-third-party:0.0-1376; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Do not assume the 2025 resource set applies to 0.0-1376; older versions include different files such as README without .md, goog/base.js, goog/deps.js, jpeg_encoder, silverlight resources, and omit newer MochiKit async test files.

Avoid trying to execute the bundled browser JavaScript as part of the generated Java test unless explicitly designed for that; no browser, JS runtime, Docker image, or system property is concretely required for normal classpath-resource coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact is a resource-only JAR containing Closure Library third-party JavaScript/HTML/license files, with no Java classes and no Maven dependencies in its POM. Meaningful JVM coverage is reachable by classpath/resource assertions against the resolved artifact; the current failure is more likely from version-specific resource/content drift than missing setup.
